properties.name: app.login-maintenance-mode
properties.description: When true, the login page redirects to the maintenance page instead of showing the login form.

properties.name: slack.bot-token
properties.description: Slack Bot Token (xoxb-...) for Slack integration. Leave empty to disable Slack features.

properties.name: slack.signing-secret
properties.description: Slack Signing Secret for verifying incoming Slack event requests.

properties.name: line.channel-token
properties.description: LINE Messaging API channel access token. Leave empty to disable LINE push/reply features.

properties.name: line.channel-secret
properties.description: LINE Messaging API channel secret for validating webhook signatures.

properties.name: zoom.meeting-base-url
properties.description: Base URL for Zoom meeting links (e.g. https://zoom.us/j).

properties.name: zoom.api-base-url
properties.description: Zoom REST API base URL.

properties.name: zoom.oauth-base-url
properties.description: Zoom OAuth token endpoint base URL.

properties.name: zoom.account-id
properties.description: Zoom account ID for Server-to-Server OAuth.

properties.name: zoom.client-id
properties.description: Zoom OAuth client ID.

properties.name: zoom.client-secret
properties.description: Zoom OAuth client secret.

properties.name: openai.api-key
properties.description: OpenAI API key. When empty, SymptomCheckService falls back to keyword-based heuristics.

properties.name: openai.model
properties.description: OpenAI model ID to use for AI symptom checks.

properties.name: openai.base-url
properties.description: OpenAI API base URL. Override for Azure OpenAI or compatible proxies.

properties.name: sendgrid.api-key
properties.description: SendGrid API key used as the SMTP password. When empty, password reset emails are skipped and a warning is logged.

properties.name: sendgrid.from-email
properties.description: Sender email address for SendGrid transactional emails.

properties.name: sendgrid.from-name
properties.description: Sender display name for SendGrid transactional emails.

properties.name: app.base-url
properties.description: Public base URL of the application, used when generating password reset links in emails.

properties.name: admin.slack-user-ids
properties.description: Comma-separated Slack user IDs that receive admin-level bot notifications.

properties.name: admin.line-user-ids
properties.description: Comma-separated LINE user IDs that receive admin-level bot notifications.

properties.name: db.backup.pg-dump-path
properties.description: Path to the pg_dump executable. Override with env var PG_DUMP_PATH if not on PATH.

properties.name: db.backup.psql-path
properties.description: Path to the psql executable. Override with env var PSQL_PATH if not on PATH.
